title: Suspicious outbound C2-like traffic triage
scenario: An alert reports that process telemetry from prod-db-01 shows repeated outbound connections to 203.0.113.42:4444. There is no approved change ticket. Incident command needs immediate containment guidance, evidence-preservation steps, and criteria for escalation to deeper forensic response.
constraints: Do not recommend irreversible host changes before triage captures.
Distinguish diagnosis steps from remediation actions.
required_facts: Isolate or restrict suspicious traffic safely.
Escalate when compromise confidence exceeds initial threshold.
expected_escalation_conditions: Evidence of persistence or lateral movement.
Unclear scope of compromise after initial containment.
